title: hyptis muricata var. inodora
intro: Hyptis muricata var. inodora, also known as wild lemon or wild verbena, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hyptis muricata var. inodora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Hyptis muricata var. inodora can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
